body.value: When many things on the technological front didn’t go as planned, we had to adopt other frameworks. ‘People as Nodes’ was one of these methodologies. Where instead of a router in a mesh network, a person would act as the intermediary/translator between two different communities. This approach distances from treating the mesh as primarily a digital technology to understanding it in its social context. It requires a reverse simulation of the technology. Co-creation requires ‘Slowness in thinking’. To be mindful about the alterations that such a network can make to the existing social relationships is something that isn’t possible on a rapid timescale. This wouldn’t have been possible without the delay.
